acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion acceptanceEvidence statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not_required.
Completion commandsRun statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not-run.
Audit acceptanceReviewed statuses are constrained to passed/failed/not_required.
Invalid status values produce file-scoped errors.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The new checks call `expect_jq`, preserving the existing `report_error` file/message pattern.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence and reports are recorded under the required paths.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` and `nix develop -c just check` are recorded in the command log.
